allow: PowerShell(if \($env:GITHUB_TOKEN -or $env:GH_TOKEN\) { "env token present" } else { "no env token" }; "protocol=https`nhost=github.com`n" | git credential fill 2>$null | ForEach-Object { if \($_ -match '^password=\(.+\)'\) { $script:tok = $Matches[1]; "git credential: found token \(len $\($tok.Length\)\)" } elseif \($_ -match '^username='\) { $_ } })
